# SpellCheck2

<img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," alt="SpellCheck2 icon">

<div class="dioxus-icons-widget" data-icon-name="SpellCheck2" data-svg="&lt;svg xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot; width=&quot;24&quot; height=&quot;24&quot; viewBox=&quot;0 0 24 24&quot; 0 1.1-1 2.3-1&quot;&gt;&lt;/path&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;" data-size="24" data-color="#000000" data-stroke="2"><div class="dioxus-icons-widget-header"><div class="dioxus-icons-widget-preview" type="button" class="dioxus-icons-widget-copy" data-di-copy="true" aria-label="Copy RSX snippet"><span data-di-copy-icon="true"></span><span data-di-copy-label="true">Copy RSX</span></button></div></div>

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::SpellCheck2;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        SpellCheck2 { size: 20, stroke: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
spelling, error, mistake, oversight, typo, correction, code, linter, a

text, development
